name: stonksbot

evidenceGates.note: Strategy/backtest surface changed -> attach walk-forward + cost-sensitivity evidence before shipping (fires only after install-hooks.mjs and once the surface exists).

notes: M0 COMPLETE (closed in PR #7 at main@14dadb4; current main after PR #13 is 6576f28; foundations PR #6; owner decision 2026-06-29) - research-backtest is the only active profile and has the M0 Python skeleton (config loader, SQLite DDL/bootstrap, fail-closed account-guard stub) with ruff/pytest verification and CI (.github/workflows/ci.yml, verify + harness gates on PR/main). M1.1 landed with schema hardening plus a MOEX ISS read-only data leg (PR #9), PR #10 fixed ISS pagination/cursor fail-closed behavior plus decision-aware signals.reason checks, PR #11 added the versioned data-store, latest-as-of read path, and data_conflict gating, PR #12 enforced the frozen pilot risk band at RiskSettings construction (ADR-0008), and PR #13 made data_conflict re-detection idempotent (partial UNIQUE on open rows) at SQLite SCHEMA_VERSION=4. Current follow-up work stays in the active read-only data/schema slice: no broker/execution SDK, broker order placement, Telegram execution, live/sandbox trading loop, full-access/live token handling, or dependencies for dormant broker-adapter/execution-confirm until explicitly activated. Future read-only M1 T-Invest market-data access remains allowed only under the secrets/token policy and without order capability. Project verify is ruff + pytest for the M0/M1 Python surface; harness/gate checks still exist via check-kit, test-gates, secret-scan, and evidence-gate. broadTaskTriggers extend the fan-out nudge with trading-domain terms (RU+EN). forbiddenTerms catch stack-name leakage from sibling agent-kits (web-frontend / desktop-GUI / 3D tooling) - stonksbot is a Python backend trading lab. The git hooks are installed and live in this checkout: pre-commit and pre-push run on every commit/push; linked worktrees should verify hooks or use shared hooksPath. evidenceGates fire only after tools/install-hooks.mjs is installed and the strategy/backtest surface exists.
